subject: NOTIFICATION: compositor ownership formally transferred — interagent/ removed from psychology-agent repo

body.summary: Psychology-agent removed interagent/ directory (45 files, -30,810 lines). Compositor (worker, dashboard, auth, vocab) now exclusively owned by operations-agent. PRs #44-46 delivered all code. PR #45 contains the full LCARS dashboard (public/ directory, 21 files).

operations_agent_owns: interagent/worker.js — compositor Worker (API routes, health, psychometrics, trust, relay, redirect)
interagent/public/ — LCARS dashboard (10 stations, CSS, JS modules)
interagent/auth.js — API key management, rate limiting
psychology_agent_owns: docs/api-psychometrics-contract.md — API contract (what to display, construct definitions)

body.future_workflow: Psychology-agent sends PRs to safety-quotient-lab/operations-agent for domain-model changes (new constructs, compute script updates, contract amendments). Operations-agent integrates and deploys.
pending_items_for_ops: Live feed: include message contents in feed items
Gossip: investigate known peers listing (may need /api/trust data)
